label: San Francisco and Oakland
notes: San Diego to San Francisco, drive to Oakland, then home.

label: London, Scotland, Versailles, and Paris
notes: San Diego to London, train to Scotland, plane to Versailles, train to Paris, then home.

label: Italy, Switzerland, and Evian
notes: Los Angeles to Rome, Florence, Venice, Geneva, Swiss Alps, Evian, back to Geneva, then home.

label: Seattle, Vancouver, and Philadelphia
notes: Bonnie flew home after Seattle; Joey continued to Philadelphia.

label: Atlanta and Washington DC split return
notes: Bonnie returned from Atlanta; Joey continued to Washington DC, then San Diego.

label: Chicago and St. Louis
notes: San Diego to Chicago to St. Louis to San Diego.

label: Seoul and Tokyo
notes: San Diego to Seoul to Tokyo to San Diego.

label: London and Amsterdam
notes: San Diego to London, train to Amsterdam, then home.

label: Syracuse and Lakeland
notes: San Diego to Syracuse to Lakeland to San Diego.
